body_transformation: The blocky geometric body now features molten gold armor plating with charcoal black seams, its sharp edges glowing faintly with ember sparks. The rounded head retains its shape but is textured with magma-cracked skin, deep crimson cracks radiating from the single eye. Short stubby legs are encased in heat-resistant obsidian plates, while the curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame of burnt orange. The pink highlights shift to amber glows along the seams of the armor, and the dark red accents become molten gold veins.
signature_feature: Flame-tipped tail: molten crimson flame with ember sparks and glowing charcoal tips.
